query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS overseas_assets (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectId int NOT NULL,
  userId int NOT NULL,
  type enum('character','scene','prop','costume') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'character',
  name varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  description text,
  stylePrompt text,
  styleImageUrl text,
  styleModel varchar(64),
  mjPrompt text,
  nbpPrompt text,
  mjImageUrl text,
  mainImageUrl text,
  mainModel varchar(64),
  viewFrontUrl text,
  viewSideUrl text,
  viewBackUrl text,
  viewCloseUpUrl text,
  multiAngleGridUrl text,
  referenceImageUrl text,
  resolution varchar(32),
  aspectRatio_asset varchar(16),
  tags varchar(500),
  isGlobalRef boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
  sortOrder int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:

)
